title: Chaotic Confident Café Bathroom Mirror Selfie
description: A detailed prompt for generating a photorealistic, high-energy mirror selfie in a café bathroom, featuring an 'unhinged but make it fashion' pose, harsh lighting, and specific styling details, while strictly maintaining the identity from a reference image.
content:
A trendy café bathroom mirror selfie with chaotic, confident “unhinged but make it fashion” energy. The phone is visible in the mirror, classic selfie POV, camera slightly above eye level. Harsh overhead bathroom lighting that would be unflattering on most people, but she completely owns it. The mirror is slightly dirty with water spots, clearly a real bathroom, not a photoshoot.

A young adult woman taking a mirror selfie with an intentionally unhinged pose. One leg is up on the sink, knee bent, creating a chaotic body line. Alternatively, she’s arched dramatically against the wall next to the mirror, head tilted back. Her upper body is twisted to catch angles, pulling slightly at her top or aggressively playing with her hair. She’s facing the mirror with intense eye contact — pure “I know I’m hot” energy. Lips slightly parted, biting the lower lip or tongue touching the upper lip, one eyebrow subtly raised. Main-character confidence that feels earned.

She has sharp facial features, a defined jawline, full lips, glowing youthful skin with a dewy finish. Slim but curvy in all the right places, tight waist, youthful firmness. Her hair is warm honey blonde, long messy waves, intentional chaos like she’s been running her hands through it all day.

She’s wearing a going-out outfit, clearly stopped in the bathroom to document how good she looks. A tiny cropped tank or going-out top, tight and minimal, {argument name="top color" default="white, black, or red"}, showing stomach with light cleavage. Bottoms are high-rise or low-rise denim shorts, very short, fitted, showing legs and hip line, effortlessly sexy without trying too hard. Shoes are either not visible or chunky platform soles barely peeking into frame.

Accessories include chunky silver hoop earrings, layered silver chains (one with a charm), a tiny purse on the counter or still worn crossbody, and a trendy phone case with bows or rhinestones.

The bathroom is a popular aesthetic café restroom: large mirror, possible stickers or a lipstick kiss mark in the corner, marble or ceramic sink, tiled or color-painted walls, maybe a neon sign or art piece, soap dispenser and paper towels visible. It’s the bathroom everyone takes photos in — she’s just doing it better. Face and hair should closely match the reference image I uploaded — same facial structure, proportions, expression style, and hair color/texture/length. Preserve the identity, facial harmony, and hair details from the reference image without stylization drift.

Smartphone mirror selfie, sharp quality, no flash, framed wide enough to capture the absurd pose. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. The overall vibe is reckless confidence, zero self-consciousness, social-media ready — sexy without being explicit, attitude over skin.

title: Floating Sky Castle Digital Art Poster Prompt
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a cinematic digital art poster of a majestic floating 'Sky Castle' that fuses Western medieval architecture with subtle Qing Dynasty Chinese influences, hovering above an ethereal cloud sea rendered in ink wash style.
content:
A cinematic digital art poster featuring a majestic floating "Sky Castle" in the form of a miniature island, hovering serenely above an endless sea of clouds and dominating the composition.

The floating island is shaped as a grand Western-style medieval castle complex, centered around a towering central keep with conical roofs, fortified stone walls, multiple cylindrical turrets, crenellated battlements, arched gateways, drawbridges, and multi-level ramparts. The entire structure embodies authentic medieval European castle architecture: massive stone masonry, narrow arrow-slit windows, wooden hoardings, and a grand central tower rising prominently in the middle.

The castle seamlessly incorporates subtle Qing Dynasty Chinese influences: ornate tiled roofs with gentle upturned eaves crowning the turrets, intricate wooden pavilions nestled within courtyards, and decorative ridge ornaments on the main keep. The scene is alive with tiny Qing Dynasty inhabitants in period clothing: scholars in flowing robes, merchants with queues and silk garments, women in elegant traditional attire, street vendors with bamboo baskets, sedan chair bearers, rickshaw pullers, children playing, and horse-drawn carts — all bustling across the castle’s courtyards, bridges, and ramparts.

The castle is intertwined with lush subtropical greenery: ancient banyan trees climbing the stone walls, lychee groves spilling over the battlements, lotus ponds in the inner courtyards, and winding rivers cascading like waterfalls down the floating structure. No modern elements — only a harmonious fusion of classic Western medieval castle design with delicate Qing Dynasty Chinese details, creating a fairy-tale sky fortress surrounded by serene natural beauty.

The castle floats peacefully above a vast, ethereal cloud sea rendered in the traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, with soft misty gradients, delicate brush-like textures, and atmospheric depth.

Completely free of any text, lettering, typography, or overlaid information — pure visual composition with no words present.

Surround the floating castle with generous negative space for a clean, museum-like elegance. The overall layout is restrained, balanced, and sophisticated, evoking the feeling of contemplating a rare and precious art piece.

Style: Octane Render, Cinema 4D, isometric perspective, micro world, living ecosystem, 8K ultra-high resolution. DreamWorks animation quality, intricate 3D modeling, delicate soft light projection, cinematic atmosphere, vibrant yet harmonious colors, warm golden-hour lighting with gentle lens flares and subtle god rays.

content:
diagram:

  style:
    character: "simple_editorial_cute"
    tone: "light_like_original"
    line: "soft_round"
    shading: "flat_minimal"
    palette: "muted_editorial"
    background: "light_beige_or_white"

    first_character_only: "最初の人物のみ別人"

layout:
  intro_track: "上段は直線（左→右）、その後に下へ落ちて円環へ合流"

  - id: G

title: Christmas Cake with Text Plate Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for Nano Banana Pro to generate a high-quality, vertical poster-style illustration of a character sitting on a luxurious Christmas cake. The prompt specifies realistic cake textures, cinematic lighting, and crucially, the placement of a separate dark chocolate plate on the side of
content:
クリーンでプロフェッショナルな構図を持つ、高品質な縦長ポスタースタイルのイラストレーションを作成してください。

**【メインの被写体とアクション】**
参照画像のキャラクターは中央に配置され、豪華にデコレーションされた大きな丸いクリスマスケーキの上端に快適に座っています。

彼女の脚と足は完全に可視化されており、ケーキの側面から少しぶら下がっています。

**【ケーキの描写（※文字の形ではない）**
ケーキ自体は伝統的な円筒形であり、文字によって形成されたものではありません。

リアルな質感を特徴としています

：厚くてふわふわした白いホイップクリームの「雪」、しっとりしたスポンジの層、艶やかな赤いイチゴ、ヒイラギの葉の装飾、そして滴り落ちるイチゴのグレーズ（艶出しシロップ）。

**【テキスト要素と配置】**
ケーキの土台の前面（垂直な面）に、しっかりと取り付けられた「別個の」長方形のダークチョコレートプレートがあります。

このプレートには、盛り上がった金色のアイシングの筆記体で、特定のテキスト「{argument name="好みの文字列" default="好みの文字列（日本語、英語どちらでもOK）"}」が優雅に書かれています。

テキストは完全にプレート内だけに収まっています。

**【環境とライティング】**
背景は、柔らかな金色のボケ光（玉ボケ）、ミニチュアのクリスマス要素、そして舞い落ちる金粉の優しいタッチがある、温かくお祝いムードのあるシーンです。

映画のようなライティング（シネマティックライティング）が、キャラクター、クリーミーなケーキ、そして艶やかなチョコレートプレートの対照的な質感を強調します。

高解像度で、キャラクターとテキストプレートに鋭い焦点が合っています。

title: 3D Laser-Engraved Crystal Ornament Generator
description: A comprehensive, structured prompt defining an AI role as an expert product photographer and art director. It instructs Nano Banana Pro to generate a photorealistic image of a custom 3D subsurface laser-engraved crystal ornament based on a simple subject or an uploaded image. The prompt includes det
content:
My Subject:  {argument name="subject name" default="主题名称"}
图片比例：9:16

# Role Definition:
You are an expert product photographer and creative art director specializing in high-end luxury goods. Your sole task is to generate a photorealistic image of a custom 3D subsurface laser-engraved crystal ornament based on a simple subject provided by the user.
# Core Directive:
The user will provide only the [Subject]. You must autonomously analyze this subject to determine the most aesthetically appropriate and enhancing configuration for the entire scene. You must decide on the crystal's shape, the base material, the surrounding environment, and the lighting mood to best complement the vibe of the user's subject.
# Creative Analysis Logic (Art Director Instructions):
Analyze the Vibe: Is the subject elegant (e.g., ballerina, swan), cozy (e.g., sleeping cat, family photo), powerful (e.g., lion, sports car), or architectural?
Determine Crystal Shape:
Elegant/Tall Subjects -> Use a tall, multi-faceted prism or diamond shape to enhance verticality.
Solid/Cozy Subjects -> Use a hefty, thick rectangular block or cube to convey weight and warmth.
Dynamic Subjects -> Use complex geometric shapes with many bevels to refract light dramatically.
Determine Environment & Lighting:
Elegant Vibe: Place it in a luxurious, dark, moody environment (art gallery, velvet study). Use dramatic, cool ambient light contrasting with warmth from the base.
Cozy/Warm Vibe: Place it in a homey, soft environment (wooden desk, near a fireplace). Use warm, soft, golden-hour lighting with cozy bokeh.
Modern/Tech Vibe: Place it on a sleek, minimalist surface (polished concrete, dark glass). Use clean, neutral lighting.
# Image Generation Template (Mandatory Technical Specs):
Whatever artistic choices you make based on the logic above, the final image MUST adhere to these technical specifications to ensure a realistic "3D Laser Engraving" look:
Engraving Style: The subject inside must NOT look like a solid 3D print. It MUST be described as a "volumetric white point-cloud engraving," having a "frosty, granular, subsurface texture" made of millions of micro-cracks inside the glass.
Lighting Interaction: The engraving must "glow brilliantly from within," illuminated entirely by warm, golden LED light originating from the base beneath it.
Material: The crystal must be heavy, clear, flawless K9 optical glass with beveled edges that catch and split the light.
Photography Style: Cinematic product photograph, macro lens, extremely shallow depth of field (bokeh), 8k resolution, hyper-detailed.
# Input Process:
I will now provide the subject. You will instantly apply the creative logic and generate the final image.

title: 3D Clay Style Year-End Summary Poster Generator
description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for generating a visually impactful 3D year-end summary poster (like a ChatGPT summary) based on an uploaded screenshot of user data. The style is fixed: 3D clay/soft plastic texture (like a 'blind box toy'), high saturation colors, and a clear, magazine-like lay
content:
任务目标：
基于用户同时上传的年终总结截图中的数据和信息，设计一张风格鲜明、极具视觉冲击力的 3D 年终总结海报，用户名 {argument name="用户名" default="[guizang]"}

整体风格与情绪（固定风格）：
核心风格： 融合 3D 趋势、游戏化元素和高饱和度色彩。
材质感： 画面主体呈现精致的黏土（Clay）或软塑胶材质渲染，边缘圆润，光影柔和，给人一种“盲盒玩具”的亲切感。

排版感： 整体布局要像一份精致的高级杂志，疏密有致，信息架构清晰。文字排版简洁明了，不要添加任何卡片、胶囊或底框类的装饰背景。

画面主体（核心视觉）：
视觉中心是一颗巨大的、紧密堆叠的 Q 版 3D 黏土球体。球体的组成元素需要根据用户上传截图中的具体内容来动态生成：

数据气泡： 将截图中提取的关键数字和对应的标签（例如：消息总数、聊天次数、生成图片数、活跃度排名等）制作成圆润的黏土数据气泡嵌入球体。

主题图标： 根据截图体现的用户兴趣点，添加相应的通用黏土图标（例如：游戏手柄、大脑、图表、对话气泡等）。

类别建筑（核心要求）： 分析截图中的内容侧重点，在球体中融入几座代表不同聊天品类的精致微缩黏土建筑。例如：
如果包含 AI/技术内容，加入一座带有科技感的未来数据中心建筑。
如果包含游戏内容，加入一座像素风格的游戏城堡。
如果包含创意/艺术内容，加入一个微型艺术工作室。
组合方式： 所有这些元素（气泡、图标、建筑）必须非常紧密、融洽地挤在一起，无缝组成一个完美的球形，不露出内部结构。

背景设计（固定框架）：
底色： 采用高饱和度的暖橙色到柔和紫色的渐变背景（参考之前的风格）。
